The '''Ancient Grove''' was a site on [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]] where the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] often came to [[Meditation/Legends|meditate]]. Located near the [[Jedi Enclave]], the Ancient Grove was ancient even when the Enclave was built, and its structures bore a strong resemblance to those of a site of [[Rakata/Legends|Rakatan]] [[Rakatan ruins (Dantooine)|ruins]] located nearby. The ancient grove was, from the Enclave, just a short walk across the [[Matale estate]].<ref name="KOTOR" />

When the [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Juhani]] fell to the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]], mistakenly believing that she had slain her [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]], [[Quatra]], in anger, she fled to the grove. Her dark influence had an effect on the local [[Kath hound/Legends|kath hounds]], making them more aggressive than was otherwise normal. [[Revan/Legends|Revan]], who had had his memory wiped and was engaging in his [[Jedi training/Legends|retraining]], was told to cleanse the grove as the final test to be admitted into the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] as a Padawan. There, he encountered Juhani, and after a short [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] [[Duel in the Ancient Grove|duel]], convinced the [[Cathar/Legends|Cathar]] to return to the [[Light side of the Force/Legends|light side]].<ref name="KOTOR" />

After the Jedi Enclave was destroyed by [[Darth Malak]] and the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] had departed Dantooine, the [[Khoonda]] government blocked off access to the ancient grove.<ref name="KOTORII">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''</ref>
